[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011111010 6
1 0011010000 3
2 1010100100 4
3 0111011011 7
4 1011011111 8
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 0111111110 8

01 10 0011111010 6 match 0
12 21 0011100011 5
23 32 0011100010 4
34 43 0011010000 3 match 1
45 54 0010000000 1
56 65 0010000000 1
67 76 0011011011 6
70 07 0011011110 6

02 20 0111100110 6
13 31 0011111010 6 match 0
24 42 0011000000 2
35 53 0010100000 2
46 64 0011010000 3 match 1
57 75 1010000100 3
60 06 0111011010 6
71 17 0011011011 6

03 30 0011111010 6 match 0
14 41 0011010000 3 match 1
25 52 0010100100 3
36 63 0011011010 5
47 74 0011010000 3 match 1
50 05 0010100100 3
61 16 0011011011 6
72 27 0011000111 5

04 40 0011010000 3 match 1
15 51 0010100000 2
26 62 0111000011 5
37 73 0011011010 5
[completion]
